prompt: Create a nostalgic, film-photography style image of one young woman with a short black bob haircut kneeling on a polished wooden floor in a traditional Japanese home while cleaning. She is wearing a cream short-sleeve top, pale floral long skirt, and a white apron tied at the back. Show exactly 1 person, exactly 1 white cleaning cloth under her right hand, and no other active characters. Her face should be intentionally obscured with a soft square blur or shadowed anonymizing block, while her body posture is clear: bent forward on one knee, one hand pressing the cloth to the floor and the other hand supporting her balance. The setting is an old wooden Japanese interior with sliding doors, frosted glass panels, dark wood trim, a dresser, and a softly visible back room. Use warm late-afternoon sunlight streaming from the side, creating golden reflections on the glossy floor and gentle shadow bands across the room. Compose the scene at floor level with shallow depth of field, muted earthy colors, analog grain, slight lens softness, and a subtle red-orange light leak along the right edge, like a candid 35mm film still. Keep the mood quiet, domestic, and intimate, focused on the act of cleaning.
